info.title: MicroserviceGenerator.CLI
info.description: 🚀 Complete toolkit for generating production-ready .NET 8 microservices with DDD, CQRS, Clean Architecture, Event-Driven Architecture, and comprehensive infrastructure. Generate enterprise-grade microservices with REST APIs, CQRS, MongoDB read models, RabbitMQ messaging, external service integration, Docker, and complete testing suite.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: MicroserviceKit - Complete toolkit for generating .NET 8 microservices

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate a new microservice from template

commands.name: describe
commands.description: Show detailed information about a template
